jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at NSDC
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC family as a Teacher in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC:
NSDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC!
